title: NOA Approval Evidence Bundle
description: The §13 D11-v2 container: an outcome-keyed union of already-signed artifacts (never itself signed). Always carries the Hold Envelope, the genesis DEFERRED receipt, the gate-signed Hold Resolution (F10), the reused noa.checkpoint/0.1 head anchor (F4), the Key Manifest and its root delegation (F7). Each outcome additionally carries ONLY the artifacts that exist for it. Sub-artifact internals are validated at verify-time by their own frozen schemas + verifyArtifact — this container schema fixes ONLY the union shape (additionalProperties:false). No field is added to the receipt or checkpoint schemas (Red Line 5 / F4).
